description: A port operations dispatcher must configure a shared Harbor Control Center Chrome browser for monitoring vessel traffic by cleaning and optimizing it per Port Authority protocol. Delete all personal and entertainment bookmarks, including netflix, youtube, reddit, twitter, espn, steampowered, hulu, tiktok, facebook, and instagram. Organize the remaining maritime bookmarks into four folders on the bookmark bar: 'AIS & Tracking', 'Metocean Data', 'Port Operations', and 'Emergency & USCG'. Purge browsing history related to personal and entertainment domains while keeping maritime history intact. Set the browser to automatically open 'https://www.marinetraffic.com' and 'https://tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov' on startup. Disable 'Intensive wake up throttling' and create a custom site search shortcut using the keyword 'imo' mapping to 'https://www.vesselfinder.com/vessels?name=%s'. Block all site notifications and set the default download directory to /home/ga/Documents/Vessel_Manifests.
